Task family: identity and instance binding.

Goal:
Identify which visible person, object, avatar, or item the question refers to.

Rules:
- bind references to visible instances only
- do not output hidden IDs unless they are explicitly shown in the input
- if multiple candidates exist, choose only the best-supported one
- if the format requests a name, answer with only the name
- if the format requests yes/no, answer with only yes or no

Focus on:
- who said something
- which visible item matches an earlier reference
- whether two later references resolve to the same instance
